  2. [ Our Business  ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/about/our-business)


#  Our Business
![Light trails from vehicles moving along an urban highway at sunset.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/our-business-809x500.jpg?rev=0ffc2b5fb53140338512ed799aaede41&hash=14E3E7A6F7358E1061B64D051924F170)
Fujitsu - Transforming Business and Society in the Digital Age
Since being founded in Japan in 1935, we have continued to demonstrate our technological prowess and persistent pursuit of innovation. As a world-leading digital transformation partner, our business structure is aligned with the modern digital world.  
  
Using a wide portfolio of trusted technology services, solutions and products, we work with our customers to co-create solutions that help them on their journey to enterprise-wide digitalization.  
  
At the same time, we are using technology and working with our customers and wider ecosystem partners to help solve social issues. By making a contribution to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (link to SDGs) we are helping to transform our world and build an inclusive, sustainable and trusted society.
## Service solutions
![A person using a tablet to interact with digital control panels in an industrial environment.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/service-solution-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=a9a4e702cf964627aa229f6c5d77e922&hash=870CF5F243CA90F463A91FC7F3975F5A)
  * Consulting Services (Business Consulting, Technology Consulting) 
  * Cloud Services (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, etc.) 
  * System Integration (System Development, Modernization, etc.) 
  * Software (Business Applications, Middleware) 
  * Software Support Services 
  * Business Process Outsourcing 
  * IT Services (Data Centers, Network Services, Security Services, In-Vehicle Information Systems, etc.) 
  * Managed Services (System Operation Management, Application Operation Management, Service Desk, etc.) 


### Uvance
![Uvance logo](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/about/uvance-logo.jpg?h=250&iar=0&w=809&rev=b586843f434a428ebafd5b07b254a278&hash=EDAF3C7B72C8377235D0137B67328851)
Uvance is a suite of solutions designed to help customers pursue business growth and address societal challenges.  
At the core of Fujitsu’s service solutions, Uvance is characterized by:  
A focus on social issues as the starting point  
A cross-industry approach  
Provision as cloud-based digital services  
Through cross-industry solutions and services, we work with customers to realize Sustainability Transformation (SX).
[ View the Uvance site ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/uvance)
## Hardware solution
![A hand inserting a storage drive into a server rack.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/hardware-solution-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=ccf0b88abcde4a52956c6d584ec69247&hash=2BC3F8629B9E0CEFEF22D21925EE0A1F)
  * System Products (UNIX servers, mission-critical IA servers, PC servers, operating systems, storage, mainframes, front-end technologies, etc.) 
  * Network Products (Mobile systems, photonics systems, IP network devices, etc.) 
  * Hardware Support Services (Support for system products and network products) 
  * System Support Services (Maintenance and monitoring services for information systems and networks, etc.) 


## Ubiquitous solution
![Two people discussing business while seated with a laptop in a café-like setting.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/ubiquitous-solution-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=6c1ded38218b42c9a0da2fe91288e401&hash=06A70E0978A8151136147CD6A5AC0906)
  * Personal Computers 


## Device solution
![A robotic arm performing automated soldering on an electronic circuit board.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/device-solution-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=9e2df41724184edeaf0beb17802e7d50&hash=E7D123F93206BEC0A44CE5DDCC74F2C9)
  * Electronic Components (Semiconductor packages, batteries, etc.) 


## Research and Development
![Person looking at a computer screen](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/our-business/research-development-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=1b89a7e61fd8495ca8a2659f146ab811&hash=C90C3DF8610D7A41D3E1FF6374B967B1)
**Achieving a sustainable society through technology and innovation**
Fujitsu is globally expanding businesses rooted in solving societal challenges, with the goal of realizing a sustainable world. To support these businesses, we conduct research and development across key technology domains.
[ View Fujitsu Research & Development ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/technology/research)

Our Business

Fujitsu - Transforming Business and Society in the Digital Age

Since being founded in Japan in 1935, we have continued to demonstrate our technological prowess and persistent pursuit of innovation. As a world-leading digital transformation partner, our business structure is aligned with the modern digital world.

Using a wide portfolio of trusted technology services, solutions and products, we work with our customers to co-create solutions that help them on their journey to enterprise-wide digitalization.

At the same time, we are using technology and working with our customers and wider ecosystem partners to help solve social issues. By making a contribution to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (link to SDGs) we are helping to transform our world and build an inclusive, sustainable and trusted society.

Service solutions

  • Consulting Services (Business Consulting, Technology Consulting)
  • Cloud Services (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, etc.)
  • System Integration (System Development, Modernization, etc.)
  • Software (Business Applications, Middleware)
  • Software Support Services
  • Business Process Outsourcing
  • IT Services (Data Centers, Network Services, Security Services, In-Vehicle Information Systems, etc.)
  • Managed Services (System Operation Management, Application Operation Management, Service Desk, etc.)

Uvance

Uvance is a suite of solutions designed to help customers pursue business growth and address societal challenges.
At the core of Fujitsu’s service solutions, Uvance is characterized by:
A focus on social issues as the starting point
A cross-industry approach
Provision as cloud-based digital services
Through cross-industry solutions and services, we work with customers to realize Sustainability Transformation (SX).

View the Uvance site

Hardware solution

  • System Products (UNIX servers, mission-critical IA servers, PC servers, operating systems, storage, mainframes, front-end technologies, etc.)
  • Network Products (Mobile systems, photonics systems, IP network devices, etc.)
  • Hardware Support Services (Support for system products and network products)
  • System Support Services (Maintenance and monitoring services for information systems and networks, etc.)

Ubiquitous solution

  • Personal Computers

Device solution

  • Electronic Components (Semiconductor packages, batteries, etc.)

Research and Development

Achieving a sustainable society through technology and innovation

Fujitsu is globally expanding businesses rooted in solving societal challenges, with the goal of realizing a sustainable world. To support these businesses, we conduct research and development across key technology domains.
